patient_summary: 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952). Active problems documented 06/30/2023 include Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary), Essential hypertension (benign), Leg pain, Postoperative anemia, and Unspecified anemia. Relevant abnormal laboratory findings on 07/03/2023: Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L; Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; VLDL Cholesterol Cal 32 (H) mg/dL. TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320 mIU/mL and LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL reported. Primary care provider: Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP). Functional limitations include difficulty walking or climbing stairs (documented 06/14/2023). Planned follow-up appointments with primary care, rheumatology, cardiology, and gastroenterology are scheduled in 2024.
